channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New Jersey Uses Glock Lawsuit to Create Gun Registry Politicians Denied Wanting
item.description: Subpoenas for buyer details from New Jersey Glock dealers go beyond crime investigation.

item.title: The Specter of State-Controlled Industrial Policy
item.description: Abandon hope, all who enter here.

item.title: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey Increasingly Looks Like an Epic Disaster
item.description: Excitement greeted the announcement of Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey, but the project now appears troubled.

item.title: Takeaways from Tuesday's Primaries: Massie's Loss Shows Trump's Grip on GOP
item.description: President Trump's victory over Rep. Thomas Massie in Kentucky's primary underscores his influence within the party.
